结节病.summary: 结节病患者补充钙和维生素D可能增加高钙血症及高钙尿症风险，需谨慎评估。

ILD.title: Osimertinib plus datopotamab deruxtecan in patients with EGFR-mutated advanced NSCLC after progression on first-line osimertinib: ORCHARD.
ILD.authors: Riess JW, Yu HA, Le X, de Langen AJ, Cho BC, Piotrowska Z, Hendriks LEL, Morabito A, Bonanno L, Brustugun OT, Halvorsen TO, Kim YJ, Marrone KA, Shiraishi Y, Goldman JW, Ambrose H, Smith PE, FraenkeI PG, Tang KH, Lehman JM, Goldberg SB

ILD.title: Interstitial Lung Disease in Rheumatoid Arthritis: Incidence and Outcomes in Western Australia.
ILD.authors: Prasanna H, Inderjeeth C, Preen DB, Nossent J
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎患者间质性肺病发生率稳定增加，年龄、吸烟及巩膜炎是独立风险因素，患者死亡率显著升高。

ILD.title: Interstitial lung disease and the STING pathway.
ILD.authors: Velu PP, Zhu G, Mackenzie KJ
ILD.summary: STING通路在罕见遗传病SAVI和COPA综合征相关间质性肺病中起关键作用，但常见ILD中其意义尚不明确。

ILD.title: Izalontamab brengitecan (Iza-bren; BL-B01D1), a first-in-class EGFR-HER3 bispecific antibody-drug conjugate, for patients with EGFR-mutated NSCLC: pooled analysis of phase I and phase II trials.

ILD.title: Serum Krebs von den Lungen-6 and interstitial lung disease: a brief review.

ILD.summary: 血清KL-6是诊断和评估间质性肺疾病预后的有效生物标志物。

ILD.title: CD14(+)CD16(+) monocyte-derived TREM2 macrophages promote lung fibrosis in systemic sclerosis-interstitial lung disease.

ILD.summary: CD14+CD16+单核细胞来源的TREM2巨噬细胞促进系统性硬化症相关间质性肺病纤维化。

ILD.title: When MicroRNAs meet hypoxic pulmonary hypertension.
ILD.authors: Ma MR, Wang XK, Song X, Wang LX, Liu MH, Feng XM, Zheng C, Wang F, Ma L
ILD.summary: MicroRNA在低氧性肺动脉高压的血管重塑及平滑肌增殖中发挥核心调控作用。

ILD.title: Methodological considerations for quantitative computed tomography-based prognosis in fibrotic interstitial lung disease.
ILD.journal: Am J Respir Crit Care Med
ILD.authors: Hong Y, Shu Z
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: HLA-DRB3/4/5-based susceptibility profiles in nivolumab-induced type 1 diabetes and interstitial lung disease.

ILD.title: Oxygen therapy in interstitial lung disease - navigating benefit and burden.
ILD.authors: Guler SA, Khor YH, Holland AE, Ekstrom M
ILD.summary: 对于间质性肺病伴低氧血症患者，需在共同决策框架下权衡家庭氧疗的获益（如减少急性加重）与负担。

ILD.title: Leukopenia and systemic features in Sjogren's disease: a retrospective hospitalized cohort study.
ILD.authors: Zhu Y, Wang Y, Feng R, Jin Y, He J
ILD.summary: SjD住院患者中白细胞减少与间质性肺病等系统受累相关。

ILD.summary: 整合临床、剂量和炎症特征的机器学习模型可有效预测肺癌合并间质性肺病患者的放射性肺炎风险。

ILD.title: Using Genetic Risk Scores for Rheumatoid Arthritis-Associated Interstitial Lung Disease Risk Stratification.

ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.summary: 联合免疫抑制治疗需基于表型，对炎症进展型SSc-ILD有效，尤其合并皮肤、关节、肌肉受累时。

ILD.summary: 1990至2023年中国ILD/PS发病率上升但死亡率下降，存在显著性别差异，且2023年出现异常波动。
